response:
```sql
WITH monthly_signups AS (
  SELECT 
    DATE_TRUNC('month', created_at) as month,
    COUNT(*) as signups
  FROM users
  GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('month', created_at)
),
monthly_growth AS (
  SELECT 
    month,
    signups,
    LAG(signups) OVER (ORDER BY month) as prev_month_signups
  FROM monthly_signups
)
SELECT 
  month,
  signups,
  prev_month_signups,
  CASE 
    WHEN prev_month_signups IS NULL OR prev_month_signups = 0 THEN NULL
    ELSE ROUND(((signups - prev_month_signups) * 100.0 / prev_month_signups), 2)
  END as growth_rate_percent
FROM monthly_growth
ORDER BY month;
```
